name: codex-chats-export
description: Export local Codex chats and Claude transcripts from inside Codex.

interface.longDescription: Use local MCP tools to export selected Codex chats or Claude Code transcripts to markdown or plain text without leaving Codex.
defaultPrompt: Export these Codex deeplinks to markdown.
Export the summer project chats with tool logs.
Export this Claude transcript as txt.
